compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement ticket-lifecycle.sh with bulk compact, archive, and retry push
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lifecycle.sh`:
1. Accept `--base-path=<dir>` (default: $REPO_ROOT/.tickets-tracker)
2. Bulk compact: find all tickets with >10 events, run ticket-compact.sh --threshold=10 --skip-sync for each
3. Archive: call `python3 ticket-graph.py --archive-eligible --tickets-dir=<base>` to get eligible tickets, write ARCHIVED event for each
4. Single git commit: stage all changes, commit with message 'chore: ticket lifecycle — bulk compact and archive'
5. 3-retry fetch-rebase-push loop: fetch, rebase, push. On non-fast-forward, retry up to 3 times.
6. Idempotent: safe to run multiple times (compact skips already-compacted, archive skips already-archived)

## File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lifecycle.sh`
- Modify: `.test-index` (remove RED marker)

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Task b1c3-47a7 tests go GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lifecycle.sh
- [ ] All lifecycle tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendments

### Critical: --no-commit flag for ticket-compact.sh (GAP-02)
ticket-compact.sh commits per-ticket. The single-commit requirement means ticket-lifecycle.sh must:
1. Add --no-commit flag to ticket-compact.sh that skips the git add + git commit inside the flock
2. Call ticket-compact.sh with --no-commit --skip-sync for each ticket
3. Stage all changes and commit once after all compactions + archives complete

### File Impact Update
- ALSO modify: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-compact.sh (add --no-commit flag)

### ARCHIVED event writing (GAP-01)
ticket-lifecycle.sh constructs and writes ARCHIVED events directly using JSON + git add, similar to how ticket-compact.sh writes SNAPSHOT events. No separate script needed.

### Sync strategy (GAP-04)
Do a single git fetch/pull at the start, then pass --skip-sync to each ticket-compact.sh call. Avoid N sync calls.

### Retry strategy (GAP-05)
On rebase conflict: git rebase --abort, re-apply changes on fresh HEAD, retry push. After 3 failures: exit non-zero with diagnostic message.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: ticket-lifecycle.sh implemented with bulk compact, archive, single commit, retry push. --no-commit added to ticket-compact.sh. All tests GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
